title: ochna odora
intro: Ochna odora, also known as the Mickey Mouse plant or red-berry bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae, native to southern Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ochna odora are attributed to its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and berries are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
